title: amelanchier canadensis subvar. lancifolia
intro: Amelanchier canadensis subvar. lancifolia, also known as the lancet-leaved shadblow, is a deciduous shrub or small tree belonging to the Rosaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues and wound healing. The health benefits of Amelanchier canadensis subvar. lancifolia include reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in traditional folk remedies for its medicinal properties.
